## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Q1 SEO initiatives and December performance.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Tech Issue:** A CMS bug prevents meta descriptions from displaying on the front end. Vivek will flag it to WonderUp for resolution.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [**Newsletter Focus:** The upcoming newsletter will feature the SF agent-a-thon as its main event to drive sign-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [**Programmatic SEO:** Industry pages are ready for launch; use case pages require revisions from Fran.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**December Performance:** Traffic nearly matched October levels despite the holidays, showing recovery from November's Google Tag issue.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

## Topics

### Technical Audit Findings

  - [A recent technical audit found a CMS bug: meta descriptions updated in the back end are not appearing on the front end.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [**Action:** Vivek will flag the issue to WonderUp for resolution.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

### Programmatic SEO Update

  - [**Industry Pages:** CMS elements are approved; internal pipeline buildout begins, targeting a launch in the next few weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**Use Case Pages:** Require revisions. Fran is following up on the necessary changes.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### December Performance Review

  - [**Overall Traffic:** Nearly matched October levels, recovering from November's Google Tag issue.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Non-Branded SEO:** A slight decline is attributed to Google's bot traffic removal efforts, which began in September.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Content Cohorts:**](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Performance was positive across all cohorts.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [The new "AI at scale" cohort is performing well, validating its focus on decision-makers (AI engineers, agent designers).](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Older clusters (AI agents, architecture) remain strong.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [Construction is the top performer; manufacturing and other clusters are targeted for growth.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:**](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Traffic slowed during the holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Top-performing articles were statistics-focused (e.g., AI agents, sales, construction).](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Brand Tracking (Scrunch):** No significant changes; "DataGrid" remains the top query with positive sentiment.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Q1 Newsletter & Content Strategy

  - [**Newsletter Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [**Primary Focus:** SF agent-a-thon, to drive sign-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**Event Info Source:** Lindsay or Tiago's EA, Rai.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
      - [Launch programmatic SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
      - [Reorganize content clusters to consolidate topics.](https://fathom.video/share/qd4QTWqs5tqHx14F6o5AA17wi4wKrjfF?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
